TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ita thao ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Yuchi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 348 buwan, 970 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 296 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 674 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Thau 27%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru ngasal psatu tegami. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ita thao hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Ita thao hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ita thao hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ita thao hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Ita thao hya' ga Qatu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ita tħao ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu juʦ~ʨħi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tħau **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa qatu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu "tajwan ħaws~ɕiŋ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ita thao ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Yuchi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 348 buwan, 970 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 296 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 674 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Thau 27%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru ngasal psatu tegami. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ita thao hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Ita thao hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ita thao hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ita thao hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Ita thao hya' ga Qatu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ita tħao ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu juʦ~ʨħi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tħau **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na ita tħao ħjaʔ ɣa qatu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu "tajwan ħaws~ɕiŋ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
